summary: Replayed ADR 0280 from the merged `0.177.99` mainline baseline using committed source `65305c70c7049bcb177f59b5a44ab0d031a8a10c`, carried the private Changedetection.io runtime and authenticated `/v1/changedetection/` gateway contract onto the live `0.130.66` platform, and recorded the canonical exact-main proof that advances the tracked platform baseline to `0.130.67` on release `0.177.100`.

verification.observed: The latest-main retry branch passed `64 passed in 2.57s` across the Changedetection, platform-vars, Mattermost, NetBox, OpenBao, data-retention, and Plausible regressions, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0280-mainline-r2-targeted-checks-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Syntax coverage on the merged baseline
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-changedetection`, `make syntax-check-plausible`, `make syntax-check-mattermost`, and `make syntax-check-netbox` all passed on the retry branch, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0280-mainline-r2-syntax-checks-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Release planning and protected release write
verification.observed: The release dry run confirmed current version `0.177.99` and next version `0.177.100`, and the write run prepared release `0.177.100` while the shared baseline still reported `platform_version: 0.130.66`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0280-mainline-r2-release-dry-run-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0280-mainline-r2-release-write-r1.txt`.

`make converge-changedetection` succeeded from source commit `65305c70c7049bcb177f59b5a44ab0d031a8a10c` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=312 changed=115 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=32 rescued=0 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0280-mainline-r3-live-apply-0.177.100.txt`.

verification.check: Current host and private runtime state
verification.observed: Fresh post-commit probes confirmed `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base`, `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a (running kernel: 6.17.13-2-pve)`, and `sudo qm status 120 => status: running`; the settled guest probe confirmed the `changedetection` container is healthy on `0.54.7`, `watch_count == 9`, `tag_count == 4`, and `/opt/changedetection/watch-sync-report.json` reports `changed=false` with zero pending actions.

A fresh authenticated `curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $LV3_TOKEN" https://api.lv3.org/v1/changedetection/` returned the live Changedetection UI HTML for version `0.54.7`, confirming the gateway route is serving the refreshed private runtime.

verification.check: Branch-side repository automation and validation bundle
verification.observed: While `ws-0280-main-merge` remained `ready_for_merge`, `git diff --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces health-probes`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed on the exact-main candidate.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main replay that justifies advancing `platform_version` from `0.130.66` to `0.130.67` for ADR 0280 on release `0.177.100`.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains the audit trail for the first time ADR 0280 became true on platform version `0.130.63`.

The earlier exploratory `r2` replay and proof bundle from the uncommitted `0.177.100` candidate remain preserved as audit history, but the committed-source `r3` replay recorded here supersedes them as canonical evidence.
